info.name: Infinite Track - Client Critical Smoke Gate (Staging)
info.description: Client-critical staging smoke gate for Infinite Track. Covers strict auth, deterministic WFO/WFH attendance, DB-bridged same-day WFA booking fixtures, WFA existing/new booking check-in and checkout paths, stable negative cases, and best-effort cleanup against the live staging runtime. WFA same-day fixture setup is intentionally external to the API because booking creation correctly rejects same-day bookings.

item.description: Removes the existing-booking attendance so the same Management identity can exercise the new-booking WFA happy path in one smoke session.

exec: pm.test('existing WFA attendance reset is accepted', () => pm.expect([200, 404]).to.include(pm.response.code));

item.description: Requires a same-day approved WFA booking fixture for the Management identity. Seed the fixture directly in staging DB, set existingManagementBookingId, managementWfaLatitude, managementWfaLongitude, and run during the live check-in window. If the fixture is absent, this happy-path block is skipped and the smoke gate continues to the new-booking path.
